title: Cannot login to account

description: Application crashes immediately on launch with error code 0x80004005 on Windows 10.

description: Dashboard takes over 30 seconds to load. Timeout errors appearing in browser console.

description: Cannot update profile picture or email address. Form submission returns 422 error.

description: VIP user lost access to premium features after billing cycle renewal yesterday.

description: User requested password reset but confirmation email not received after 45 minutes.

title: Subscription not working after payment

title: Account locked after failed logins
description: Account locked after 3 failed login attempts. Unlock email not working.

description: iOS app not syncing data with web dashboard. Last sync was 3 days ago.

title: Search returning no results
description: Search functionality returns empty results for all queries since last update.
